titleStmt.title: SII 39.258: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 258. (A.R. No. 258 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. BHŪVARAGAHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. VĪRPRATĀPA VĪRAVENKAṬAPATIDĒVA MAHĀRĀYA, ŚAKA 1514 (1592 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of the village Chilarabūru in Kurichipattu, a sub-division of Pallikoṇḍapaṭṭanamsima to the temple of Ādivarāha-perumāḷ by Avasaram Kōnappa, son of Timmarāsu, the grandson of Haṇḍeriga-Gaṅgādharāya, to whom it was granted as an agrahāra by Koṇḍamanāyaniṅgāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1514 Agunēṭi naṁdana saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa bahula(ḷa) 5 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīraveṁkkaṭapatidēva mahārāyaluṁgāru penugoṁḍa nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulayi pṛthīvi(pṛthvī) sāmrājyaṁ
sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhāṁ(hmāṁ)ḍa nāyakulayina śrīmuṣṇaṁ Ādivarāhaperumāḷa kōvila śrībhaṁḍāraṁ vā
ru bhāradvāja gotraṁ Āśvalāyanasūtra ruku śākhādhyāyulaina haṁḍeriga gaṁgādharaya pautṛlayina tiṁmarusu putṛṁḍaina Avasaraṁ kona
ppaku yiccina silāśāsanakramameṭlannanu koṁḍamanāyanigāru nīku Agrarānakuṁgānu naḍapukoṁmani yicina palli koṁḍāpaṭnaṁ sīmalōni
kuricipattulōni cilaṁbūru grāmaṁ Ādivarāha pērumāḷlaku samarpaṇa śēstivi(mi) ganaka yiṁdulaku Ādivarāhapērumāḷaku nityapaḍi
tarānaku Amudapaḍi ka 1 . 2 Akṣarālānu yiruvai tūmulu parupu tūmeḍu nēyi sēru Aṁduku tagga pōrikariUyamudulu cārlu mōrluti
rupuṇyarālu dōśalu 51 nni vaḍalu 51 nni Appaṁ 51 nni Atirasālu 51 nnicaṁdanaṁ palaṁ 1 Aḍikāmu palaṁ 1 Ākulu 51 nni Ādimū
rtti prasādalabdhaṁgānu viṭṭavan viḍukāḍu ceturdhāṁ śānaku kalasvataṁtrāluṁnnu tōṁṭaku yēnūru kuṁṭalu nēla nivēśanālu reṁḍuṁnu Istimi gana
ka nī putra pautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu dānādi vinimaya vikraya yōgyaṁ Agunaṭṭugānu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁcēdi Ani Iccina silāśāsanamu
yī tōṁpu 500 guṁṭalu phalānaku vaccina mīdanu vaccina phalamu nalananu toṁpu ceśe manuṣyulanaṁ baḷaṁ pōṁgā nilicinaṁdu
lōnu caturthāraśaṁ mīku naḍapagalavāramu ¤śri kraṣṇapaṭṭan śrīpavarāhabhaṭṭa(n)¤ melppaṭi ¤śrī kraṣṇabhaṭṭan¤
Acyutappanāyanivāri nirvāhaṁ Appaya śrī śrī śrīṁjēyunū
Digital edition of SII 39.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
